title: Regression: synth for ice40 up5k fails reading internal cells
body:
Seems to not matter what the design contains, caveat the loaded netlist is from the GHDL front end, however it synthesizes correctly without -device u -dsp.  Recent regression, less than one week.

```
yosys> synth_ice40 -device u -dsp

2. Executing SYNTH_ICE40 pass.

2.1. Executing Verilog-2005 frontend: /home/jeff/work/tools/usr/bin/../share/yosys/ice40/cells_sim.v
Parsing Verilog input from `/home/jeff/work/tools/usr/bin/../share/yosys/ice40/cells_sim.v' to AST representation.
/home/jeff/work/tools/usr/bin/../share/yosys/ice40/cells_sim.v:2112: ERROR: Found specify edge but no data spec.

jeff@JeffNB:~/work/tools/blink$
```
code_blocks:
yosys> synth_ice40 -device u -dsp

2. Executing SYNTH_ICE40 pass.

2.1. Executing Verilog-2005 frontend: /home/jeff/work/tools/usr/bin/../share/yosys/ice40/cells_sim.v
Parsing Verilog input from `/home/jeff/work/tools/usr/bin/../share/yosys/ice40/cells_sim.v' to AST representation.
